Domain=[CONTOSO] OS=[Windows Server 2022 Datacenter Evaluation 20348] Server=[Windows Server 2022 Datacenter Evaluation 6.3]

	Sharename       Type      Comment
	---------       ----      -------
	ADMIN$          Disk      Remote Admin
	C$              Disk      Default share
	IPC$            IPC       Remote IPC
	NETLOGON        Disk      Logon server share
	SYSVOL          Disk      Logon server share
	Public          Disk      Public share
	Backups         Disk      Daily backups
	Reports         Disk      Quarterly reports
	HR              Disk      HR documents

Reconnecting with SMB1 for workgroup listing.

	Server               Comment
	---------            -------

	Workgroup            Master
	---------            -------
	WORKGROUP            DC01
